case_title: KIMBERLY HAGIN VS. BANDRUSH MANAGEMENT, L.L.C. et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,525.00 FILED BY HAGIN, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT BANDRUSH MANAGEMENT, L.L.C. MAINZER, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED MAY-24-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANDRUSH MANAGEMENT, L.L.C.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANDRUSH MANAGEMENT, L.L.C. MAINZER, BILL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-25-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAGIN, KIMBERLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 2845 PIERCE STREET, LLC. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST BANDRUSH MANAGEMENT, LLC AND BILL MAINZER ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. 2845 PIERCE STREET, LLC IS ADDED AS THE PROPER DEFENDANT AND BILL MAINZER WAIVES SERVICE ON BEHALF OF 2845 PIERCE STREET, LLC. ALL PARTIES AGREE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
